film.title: The Lego Batman Movie
film.overview: A cooler-than-ever Bruce Wayne must deal with the usual suspects as they plan to rule Gotham City, while discovering that he has accidentally adopted a teenage orphan who wishes to become his sidekick.

dialogues.dialogue: I saved the city again today.  I wish you could have seen me.  I think you would have been really proud.  There you are!  Alfred! I am so sorry.
For a brief moment  I could have sworn I felt something.  That feeling is pride, sir.  You're right.  I am super proud.
That feeling is pride, sir.  You're right.  I am super proud.  Of myself.  For being such a good teacher, obviously.
I need your help.  I thought you'd never ask.  I'm very, very proud of you, sir.  But there's still only four of us against Joker's entire army.  That's why I called in some backup.
